offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late financial insights. We automate report generation instead of manual report creation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient report generation from raw accounting data
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in accounting community forums
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
